important_information_gaps: Thirteen priority gaps covering contacts, attractions, fees, operators, fares, schedules, active establishments, emergencies, events, safety, photo permissions and boundary data.
fares_requiring_confirmation: MRR fares, local transport, island-hopping, environmental, landing, guide, terminal and tourism fees.
schedules_requiring_confirmation: MRR departures, Sabang–Guijalo passenger service and island-hopping operating windows.
establishments_possibly_inactive: Six accommodation leads and several food/service listings require current-operation checks.
coordinates_requiring_review: Attraction label points and all facilities without authoritative coordinates.
geospatial_issues: No production polygon approved; authoritative or properly licensed source remains required.
data_conflicts: Older transport information may conflict with current operations.
questions_for_municipal_tourism_office: Thirteen questions documented in the Caramoan validation report.
recommended_next_actions: Validate operators, fares, schedules, facilities, coordinates, boundaries and photo permissions.
notes: Pilot inventory ready for institutional review, not public deployment.

important_information_gaps: Current contacts, exact coordinates, fees, operating status, accessibility, safety, official transport schedules and establishment validation.
fares_requiring_confirmation: All recorded public-transport, local-transfer and boat fares.
schedules_requiring_confirmation: All transport schedules and annually announced event dates.
establishments_possibly_inactive: All low-confidence accommodation, restaurant and service leads require current-operation checks.
coordinates_requiring_review: All candidate records without authoritative coordinates.
geospatial_issues: Production polygon geometry remains blocked pending acquisition of a redistributable authoritative or open boundary source.
data_conflicts: No unresolved conflict treated as fact; weak or older sources are retained as leads only.
questions_for_municipal_tourism_office: Validate destinations, establishments, operators, fares, schedules, fees, contacts, safety, accessibility, photos and boundary source.
recommended_next_actions: Conduct LGU/field validation; archive source pages; obtain coordinates and permission-cleared media; then promote records to production seed data.
notes: Preliminary research inventory for review; not a complete public directory.
